title: The Xkcd thing, now interactive
author: memalign
aiHeadline: Finally, after years of waiting, XKCD has made their comics interactive—because nothing says fun like clicking buttons to read a joke.

title: I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services
author: speckx
aiHeadline: In a world where you need a government-issued ID to buy a soda, I’m still refusing to prove my age to any online service—good luck, future me.

title: MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max
author: scrlk
aiHeadline: Apple introduces the new MacBook Pro with M5 chips—because who doesn’t want to pay top dollar for slightly better performance?

title: Claude's Cycles [pdf]
author: fs123
aiHeadline: Claude’s Cycles: A new paper by Knuth that will make your head spin—because nothing says success like being buried under a pile of algorithms.

title: I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project
author: devinitely
aiHeadline: In a world where SEO is everything, I’m losing the battle to make my own open-source project visible—because nothing says success like being buried under a pile of algorithms.
